text:
----Security_Multipart(Wed_Aug_10_01_21_38_2011_131)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

Alex Henrique <alexhenrique.monte@gmail.com> wrote
  in <201108072105.p77L5mKs059204@red.freebsd.org>:

al> When a try to do a 'make install clean' on ghostscript8 port, the system shows the erro below:
al>
al> ./bin/../sobin/libgs.so: undefined reference to `lips_mode3format_encode'
al> gmake[1]: *** [bin/../sobin/gsc] Error 1
al> gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11/work/ghostscript-8.71'
al> gmake: *** [so] Error 2
al> *** Error code 1
al>
al> Stop in /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11.
al> *** Error code 1
al>
al> >How-To-Repeat:
al> Go to /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8 and type 'make install clean'

 Did you get this error with the default configuration?  If not,
 please try the default configuration and see if it works or not
 first, and then show the result of "make showconfig".

-- Hiroki
